name: D-3 Digivice
effect: Must be equipped to digivolve your partner. Required to use Digi-Eggs — without the D-3 a Tamer cannot initiate Armor Digivolution even if they possess a Digi-Egg. Glows when wild or hostile Digimon are within 6 spaces. As a Free Action, scan one visible enemy to learn their Attribute and Element. As a Basic Action, perform a deep scan on one visible enemy to learn their Attribute, Element, and one combat stat of your choice. The D-3 supports digivolution up to Mega stage — it does not have the Ultimate cap of the Season 1 Digivice.
notes: Replaces Season 1 Digivice. Required for Armor Digivolution. Cap: Mega.
